# QA Fix Plan — Chapters

This directory contains the multi-chapter fix plan generated by the QA closed-loop system.

## Chapters (auto-generated after each QA iteration)

| Chapter | Focus | Parallelism |
|---------|-------|-------------|
| ch1-arrow-routing.md | Diagonal arrows, arrows through nodes | routing.js (single file) |
| ch2-node-overlaps.md | Overlapping nodes, crowded spacing | JSON files (8 parallel) + layout.js |
| ch3-label-placement.md | Labels colliding with nodes, detached labels | routing.js label section |
| ch4-swimlane-compliance.md | Nodes outside lanes, lane height | JSON files (parallel) + layout.js |
| ch5-json-adjustments.md | Specific JSON coordinate changes per sample | All 8 sample files (fully parallel) |
| ch6-summary.md | Iteration status, clean vs dirty, next steps | — |

## Parallel Execution Strategy

```
Track A (Code Fixes):              Track B (JSON Data Fixes):
├─ js/routing.js                   ├─ order-approval.json      ─┐
│  ├─ orthogonal segment fix       ├─ ticket-triage.json        │
│  ├─ node-avoidance routing       ├─ onboarding.json           │
│  └─ label anchor positioning     ├─ incident-response.json    ├─ All 8 in parallel
├─ js/layout.js                    ├─ expense-claim.json        │
│  ├─ lane containment logic       ├─ manufacturing-fulfil...   │
│  └─ minimum spacing enforcement  ├─ lean-six-sigma.json       │
└─ (single-threaded: 2 files)      └─ decision-flow.json      ─┘
```

## Machine-Readable Data

- `json-fix-manifest.json` — Maps each sample to its required coordinate fixes
- `../../qa-png/qa-report.json` — Full geometric audit results

## Loop Workflow

```
┌─────────────┐     ┌───────────┐     ┌──────────────┐     ┌─────────────┐
│ Capture PNGs │────▸│ Analyze   │────▸│ Fix Plan     │────▸│ Apply Fixes │
│ + Geo Audit  │     │ Report    │     │ (chapters)   │     │ (code+JSON) │
└─────────────┘     └───────────┘     └──────────────┘     └──────┬──────┘
       ▲                                                          │
       └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                        Re-run until all pass
```
